description: An adjusted claim with two service lines: one paid, one denied. Tests line-level adjudication (the case a flat claim-level model can't represent) and asking for the check/EFT.
scripted_rep_turns: Provider services, can I have your NPI and the member ID?
Okay, that claim was processed. It has two lines on it.
The first line, procedure 99214, was paid 220 dollars.
The second line, procedure 20610, was denied.
That denial is code CO-97, the service is included in another procedure already paid.
The total paid was 220 dollars, sent on February 5th under EFT number 55230.
My name is Victor, reference UHC-PP-404.

lines.denial_reason_description: service included in another procedure already paid
